zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Tunstall於大約1398年出生在英國藍卡爾彤絲朵時，她的父親Sir Thomas Tunstall39歲，母親Isabel Harington31歲。她於大約1416年與Sir Robert Bellingham在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Tunstall于大约1398年出生在英国藍卡爾彤絲朵时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Tunstall39岁，母亲Isabel Harington31岁。她于大约1416年与Sir Robert Bellingham在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Tunstall was born about 1398, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Tunstall, was 39 and her mother, Isabel Harington, was 31. She married Sir Robert Bellingham about 1416, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Tunstall est née environ 1398, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Tunstall, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Bellingham environ 1416, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Tunstall um 1398 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Tunstall 39 und ihre Mutter Isabel Harington 31. Sie hat um 1416 in Westmorland, England Sir Robert Bellingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Tunstall è nata il circa 1398 nel Tunstall, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Tunstall, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Bellingham circa 1416, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Tunstallが約1398年にイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Tunstallは39歳，母Isabel Haringtonは31歳であった。約1416年にイギリスウエストモーランドでSir Robert Bellinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Tunstall(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Tunstall(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1416년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Sir Robert Bellingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Tunstall nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Bellingham aproximadamente 1416, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Tunstall родилась около 1398 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Tunstall было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Bellingham около 1416 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Tunstall nació aproximadamente 1398, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Bellingham aproximadamente 1416, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas.
